## Validation

- [ ] Ran the narrowest relevant checks.
- [ ] Ran `bun run build` when behavior or UI changed.
- [ ] Updated docs or examples when behavior changed.

## Risk

- [ ] Low risk, isolated change.
- [ ] Needs reviewer attention for migrations, deploy behavior, auth, permissions, secrets, model calls, or user-facing flows.
